openPositions.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
openPositions.description: We are looking for a Senior Full Stack Engineer to join our growing team. You will be responsible for building scalable web applications and leading technical initiatives across multiple products.
responsibilities: Build scalable web applications using Next.js and Node.js
Collaborate with design and product teams
Lead code reviews and mentor junior developers
Architect solutions for global SME clients
requirements: Experience with cloud platforms (AWS or GCP)

openPositions.title: UI/UX Designer
openPositions.description: We are looking for a creative UI/UX Designer who thinks in systems. You will shape the visual identity and user experience of our core product offerings.
responsibilities: Design product interfaces for web and mobile
Conduct user research and usability testing
requirements: Strong portfolio of SaaS or product design

openPositions.title: AI/ML Engineer
openPositions.description: Join our AI team to build intelligent features into client products. You will work on cutting-edge models and integrate them into production systems.
responsibilities: Work with product teams on AI feature roadmaps
requirements: Python and PyTorch or TensorFlow experience
Experience with OpenAI or Gemini APIs
Understanding of RAG and vector databases

perks.title: 100% Remote
perks.description: Work from anywhere in the world.

perks.title: Fast Growth
perks.description: Grow with a startup that ships real products.

perks.title: Health Coverage
perks.description: Medical coverage for you and your family.

perks.title: Async-First
perks.description: No pointless meetings. We respect deep work.

perks.title: Latest Tools
perks.description: We use the best tools available — no compromises.
